dependent_sub_questions.question_text: Which of the following points will IQ be executed?
dependent_sub_questions.stored_text:
Which of the following points will IQ be executed?

☐ Prior to System Testing
☐ Prior to UAT
☐ Prior to application's release into production.
☐ An IQ Plan will be created and approved prior to the execution of individual IQ scripts and/or procedures. The IQ Plan will document the environment description, hardware and software components, roles and responsibilities, supporting technical documentation and procedures, and expected deliverables for the IQ documentation.
☐ An IQ Summary Report will be created after the system goes into production. The IQ Summary Report will summarize the IQ process and results for all environments and any deviations from the IQ Plan.
